frame_analyses.description: Needle is being loaded onto the needle driver.
Suture being placed through the first mark on the Penrose drain.
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Needle traversing correctly, slight deviation from the mark.

frame_analyses.description: Suture being pulled through the second mark.
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Deviated slightly from the intended placement.

frame_analyses.description: First throw with a surgeon's knot being made.
Second single throw performed, hand switched.
Third throw completed after another hand switch.
frame_analyses.technique_notes: Throw appeared secure, slit remains closed.
Both suture ends cut inside the trainer.

knot_assessments.notes: Single throw with successful hand switch.
Final throw secure, second hand switch achieved.

drain_assessment.assessment_note: Slit closure properly achieved, drain remained fixed.

technique_summary: The trainee demonstrated good control while completing all throws accurately with required hand switching. The suture was slightly off-mark at placement but secure knot tying and proper slit closure were achieved.
improvement_suggestions: Focus on more accurate needle placement on first attempt.
Enhance precision when handling suture during the initial throw.
